# Samsung Health Morphe Patches

> Dex-only Morphe patches for Samsung Health on Knox-tripped (0x1) unrooted Samsung phones.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/bigyank/morphe-patches-samsung/blob/main/README.md): Quick start, troubleshooting, patch overview
- [AUDIT](https://github.com/bigyank/morphe-patches-samsung/blob/main/AUDIT.md): Comparison vs SamsungAppsPatcher PC patcher
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/bigyank/morphe-patches-samsung/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Adding Health versions, patch layout
- [AGENTS](https://github.com/bigyank/morphe-patches-samsung/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Agent handoff, hard rules, device checklist

## Install patch source

- [Add to Morphe Manager](https://morphe.software/add-source?github=bigyank/morphe-patches-samsung)
- Repo URL: https://github.com/bigyank/morphe-patches-samsung

## Releases

- [Latest release](https://github.com/bigyank/morphe-patches-samsung/releases/latest)
- Target app: `com.sec.android.app.shealth` (Samsung Health 6.32.0.001, 6.31.3.013)
- Two default-on patches: Knox integrity bypass, Samsung Account provider bypass
